categories.name: (आईईएलटीएस, टोफेल एवं अंतरराष्ट्रीय अंग्रेज़ी प्रणाली)
categories.intro:
Teacher Introduction
बच्चों, अब तक आपने:
grammar
spoken English
fluency
communication
academic English
professional English
समझ लिया।
अब हम English के उस global स्तर में प्रवेश करेंगे जहाँ:
language:
international communication
foreign education
immigration
academic testing
global professionalism
का माध्यम बनती है।
यह भाग: IELTS, TOEFL, international spoken English और global communication के लिए बनाया गया है।

categories.name: Main Goal of Part 49
categories.intro:
Student:
IELTS/TOEFL structure समझ सके
international spoken English बोल सके
band score improve कर सके
academic writing कर सके
listening comprehension improve कर सके
global communication style समझ सके

categories.name: Included Systems
categories.intro:
1. IELTS & TOEFL Overview System
2. International Spoken English System
3. IELTS Speaking System
4. IELTS Writing System
5. Academic Listening System
6. Reading Comprehension System
7. Band Score Improvement System
8. International Vocabulary System
9. Accent Neutral Communication System
10. IELTS Master Drill System

categories.name: 1. IELTS & TOEFL Overview System
categories.intro: (आईईएलटीएस एवं टोफेल परिचय प्रणाली)

categories.name: IELTS
categories.intro: International English Language Testing System

categories.name: Main Sections
categories.intro:
Listening
Reading
Writing
Speaking

categories.name: TOEFL
categories.intro: Test of English as a Foreign Language

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: दोनों exams: international English ability test करते हैं।

categories.name: 2. International Spoken English System
categories.intro: (अंतरराष्ट्रीय बोलचाल अंग्रेज़ी प्रणाली)

categories.name: Main Features
categories.intro:
clear pronunciation
neutral accent
confidence
structured speaking
natural fluency

categories.name: Weak Spoken English
categories.intro: Myself Rahul.

categories.name: Better International English
categories.intro: My name is Rahul.

categories.name: Weak
categories.intro: I am belong from Bihar.

categories.name: Correct
categories.intro: I belong to Bihar.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: International English: clear और natural communication चाहती है।

categories.name: 3. IELTS Speaking System
categories.intro: (आईईएलटीएस स्पीकिंग प्रणाली)

categories.name: Speaking Parts
categories.intro:
Part 1
Personal questions

categories.name: Example
categories.intro:
What do you do?
Where are you from?
Do you like reading books?

categories.name: Part 2
categories.intro: Cue card speaking

categories.name: Example
categories.intro: Describe a teacher who inspired you.

categories.name: Part 3
categories.intro: Discussion questions

categories.name: Example
categories.intro: Why are teachers important in society?

categories.name: Good Speaking Formula
categories.intro:
Idea
+
Reason
+
Example
+
Conclusion

categories.name: Example Answer
categories.intro: I enjoy reading books because they improve my knowledge and vocabulary. Reading also helps me relax and think creatively.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: IELTS speaking: memorization नहीं, natural fluency test करता है।

categories.name: 4. IELTS Writing System
categories.intro: (आईईएलटीएस लेखन प्रणाली)

categories.name: Writing Task 1
categories.intro: graph/chart/report

categories.name: Example
categories.intro: The graph shows the increase in internet users between 2010 and 2020.

categories.name: Writing Task 2
categories.intro: essay writing

categories.name: Example Topic
categories.intro: Should mobile phones be allowed in classrooms?

categories.name: Essay Structure
categories.intro:
1. Introduction
2. Body Paragraph 1
3. Body Paragraph 2
4. Conclusion

categories.name: Important Academic Connectors
categories.intro:
however
moreover
therefore
in conclusion
on the other hand

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: IELTS writing: formal structure मांगती है।

categories.name: 5. Academic Listening System
categories.intro: (शैक्षणिक श्रवण प्रणाली)

categories.name: Listening Skills
categories.intro:
keyword detection
note taking
accent understanding
connected speech understanding

categories.name: Common Accents
categories.intro:
British
American
Australian

categories.name: Listening Practice Sources
categories.intro:
podcasts
news
interviews
documentaries

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Listening: speed + concentration मांगती है।

categories.name: 6. Reading Comprehension System
categories.intro: (पठन समझ प्रणाली)

categories.name: Reading Skills
categories.intro:
skimming
scanning
keyword finding
inference understanding

categories.name: Skimming
categories.intro: main idea जल्दी समझना।

categories.name: Scanning
categories.intro: specific information ढूँढना।

categories.name: Example
categories.intro: Find: date, name, number, location

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: IELTS reading: speed reading test करता है।

categories.name: 7. Band Score Improvement System
categories.intro: (बैंड स्कोर सुधार प्रणाली)

categories.name: IELTS Speaking Improvement
categories.intro:
avoid memorized answers
speak naturally
use connectors
give examples

categories.name: Writing Improvement
categories.intro:
avoid grammar mistakes
improve vocabulary
maintain paragraph structure

categories.name: Listening Improvement
categories.intro:
daily listening
shadowing practice
subtitle practice

categories.name: Reading Improvement
categories.intro:
newspaper reading
article reading
speed practice

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Band improvement: daily system practice मांगता है।

categories.name: 8. International Vocabulary System
categories.intro: (अंतरराष्ट्रीय शब्दावली प्रणाली)

categories.name: Academic Words
categories.intro:
analyze
significant
factor
approach
research
evidence
global
technology
communication
development

categories.name: Speaking Vocabulary
categories.intro:
interesting
challenging
beneficial
effective
important
valuable

categories.name: Example
categories.intro: Technology plays a significant role in modern education.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: International exams: academic vocabulary पसंद करते हैं।

categories.name: 9. Accent Neutral Communication System
categories.intro: (तटस्थ उच्चारण संचार प्रणाली)

categories.name: Goal
categories.intro:
clear English
understandable pronunciation
neutral speaking style

categories.name: Important Rule
categories.intro:
Perfect British/American accent जरूरी नहीं।
Clear pronunciation जरूरी है।

categories.name: Example
categories.intro: Speak: slowly, clearly, naturally।

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Communication clarity: accent imitation से ज्यादा महत्वपूर्ण है।

categories.name: 10. IELTS Master Drill System
categories.intro: (आईईएलटीएस महारत अभ्यास प्रणाली)

categories.name: Cue Card Drill
categories.intro: Describe your favorite teacher.

categories.name: Model Answer
categories.intro: My favorite teacher is my English teacher. She is very supportive and explains concepts clearly. She always motivates students to practice daily and improve their confidence.

categories.name: Writing Drill
categories.intro: Topic: Importance of technology in education.

categories.name: Listening Drill
categories.intro: Listen to: news/podcast और keywords लिखो।

categories.name: Reading Drill
categories.intro: Read a passage और main idea identify करो।

categories.name: Speaking Drill
categories.intro: Speak continuously for: 1–2 minutes without stopping।

categories.name: Final International English Formula
categories.intro:
Fluency
+
Academic Vocabulary
+
Listening Skill
+
Structured Writing
+
Clear Pronunciation
+
Confidence
International English Mastery

categories.name: Final Goal of Part 49
categories.intro:
Student:
IELTS/TOEFL structure समझ सके
international spoken English बोल सके
academic writing कर सके
listening comprehension improve कर सके
reading speed develop कर सके
band score improve कर सके
neutral pronunciation develop कर सके
global English communication mastery प्राप्त कर सके।
